2605.29976.title: Evaluating Skill and Stability of ArchesWeather and ArchesWeatherGen under Multi-Decadal Climate Simulations
2605.29976.paper_summary: We evaluate the climate simulation capabilities of ArchesWeather and ArchesWeatherGen, two machine learning models originally trained for weather forecasting and evaluated up to a 10-day lead time. ArchesWeather is a deterministic model, while ArchesWeatherGen is a probabilistic flow-matching model leveraging ArchesWeather's forecasts, enabling ensemble-based uncertainty quantification. In this work, we adapt these models to act as forced atmospheric models by using additional conditioning on the monthly mean sea surface temperature (SST) and sea ice cover (SIC) as boundary conditions. In particular, we follow the AI Model Intercomparison Project (AIMIP) Phase 1 protocol, which, analogous to the Atmospheric Model Intercomparison Project (AMIP), proposes a standardized experimental setup to evaluate the climate skill of ML-based forced atmospheric models. We present a comprehensive evaluation of both models under these conditions, including comparison against numerical climate models, ablation studies that examine key design choices in the extension, and an analysis of forced versus unforced configurations. Despite being originally developed for weather forecasting, we demonstrate that forced configurations of ArchesWeather and ArchesWeatherGen produce stable long-term climate simulations, have a stable annual cycle, and capture the drift of many climate variables. The models faithfully reproduce ERA5's climatology, large-scale circulations and interannual variability, and they capture the tails of the distributions.
2605.29976.paper_summary_zh: 我們評估了 ArchesWeather 和 ArchesWeatherGen 的氣候模擬能力，這兩個機器學習模型最初是為了天氣預報而訓練的，並在最多 10 天的預測期內進行評估。ArchesWeather 是一個確定性模型，而 ArchesWeatherGen 是一個概率流匹配模型，利用 ArchesWeather 的預測，實現基於集合的不確定性量化。在這項工作中，我們調整這些模型，使其作為強迫大氣模型，通過使用每月平均海表溫度 (SST) 和海冰覆蓋 (SIC) 作為邊界條件進行額外的調節。特別是，我們遵循 AI 模型比較項目 (AIMIP) 第一階段的協議，該協議類似於大氣模型比較項目 (AMIP)，提出了一個標準化的實驗設置來評估基於機器學習的強迫大氣模型的氣候技能。我們在這些條件下對這兩個模型進行了全面評估，包括與數值氣候模型的比較、檢驗擴展中關鍵設計選擇的消融研究，以及強迫與非強迫配置的分析。儘管最初是為了天氣預報而開發的，我們證明了 ArchesWeather 和 ArchesWeatherGen 的強迫配置能夠產生穩定的長期氣候模擬，擁有穩定的年週期，並捕捉到許多氣候變量的漂移。這些模型忠實地再現了 ERA5 的氣候學、大規模環流和年際變率，並且捕捉到了分佈的尾部。
2605.29976.author: Renu Singh et.al.
2605.29976.authors: Renu Singh, Robert Brunstein, Antonia Jost, Thomas Rackow, Claire Monteleoni, Yana Hasson, Christian Lessig, Guillaume Couairon
